channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Four killed in Masasi–Tunduru highway collision as driver flees scene
item.description: Four people have lost their lives in a tragic road accident that occurred along the Masasi–Tunduru highway in Mtwara Region after a vehicle collided head-on with a motorcycle and later struck pedestri...

item.title: Pakistan and allied countries condemn mistreatment of Gaza flotilla activists in Israeli detention
item.description: Pakistan, along with seven other countries including Egypt, Türkiye, Indonesia, Jordan, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the United Arab Emirates, has strongly condemned what they described as the humiliating...

item.title: Mental health experts warn looksmaxxing trend among young men may signal underlying body image disorders
item.description: The article examines the rising social media trend known as looksmaxxing, in which mostly teenage boys and young men attempt to maximize their physical appearance through extreme and sometimes harmful...

item.title: Naphtha Shortages from Middle East Blockade Disrupt Manufacturing in Japan and South Korea
item.description: A significant supply shock is affecting manufacturing across East Asia due to the ongoing blockade of the Strait of Hormuz amid conflict in the Middle East. Naphtha, a vital petroleum derivative refin...

item.title: SAFA congress expels four suspended NEC members over court challenge
item.description: The South African Football Association (SAFA) has expelled four of its suspended national executive committee (NEC) members following a resolution taken at its congress held on the East Rand in Johann...

item.title: Police investigate discovery of human skeletal remains near A617 in Nottinghamshire woodland
item.description: Police in Nottinghamshire have launched an investigation after suspected human skeletal remains were discovered in woodland close to the A617 near the Rainworth Bypass. The remains were found by membe...

item.title: DC area forecast: Warmer temperatures with intermittent showers through Memorial Day and midweek
item.description: This weather update for the Washington, D.C. area highlights a transition toward warmer and slightly drier conditions today, though unsettled weather remains in the forecast. Meteorologists report tha...

item.title: DMW Confirms Repatriation of More Than 10,000 OFWs from Conflict-Affected Areas in the Middle East
item.description: The Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) reported that more than 10,000 Filipinos have already been repatriated from several conflict-affected areas in the Middle East amid the ongoing tensions involvi...

item.title: ADC leadership crisis deepens as Kachikwu faction announces new party executives in Abuja
item.description: Fresh leadership wahala don break out inside the African Democratic Congress (ADC) after the Dumebi Kachikwu-led faction announced the dissolution of the National Working Committee (NWC) linked to for...

item.title: UK heatwave prompts guidance to provide outdoor water for wildlife
item.description: UK authorities and conservation groups are encouraging households across parts of the United Kingdom to place bowls of water outside their homes during a period of unusually hot weather expected to la...

item.title: Evacuation orders issued in Southern California after chemical storage tank poses explosion risk
item.description: Authorities in Southern California ordered approximately 50,000 residents to evacuate after officials warned that a large chemical storage tank was at risk of exploding. Emergency crews responded to t...

item.title: Family dispute arises over burial of Rachel Wandeto following fatal petrol attack
item.description: Tensions have emerged between the maternal and matrimonial families of Rachel Wandeto following her tragic death after a petrol attack. According to reports, Rachel passed away slightly over a week af...

item.title: Cristian Mungiu Wins Cannes Palme d’Or While Palestinian Filmmakers Strengthen Presence at Festival
item.description: The 79th Cannes Film Festival concluded with Romanian director Cristian Mungiu winning the Palme d’Or for his film 'Fjord', marking his second victory at the prestigious festival nearly two decades af...

item.title: Editors Guild of India criticises absence of open press conferences by PM Modi after Norway and Netherlands media exchanges
item.description: The Editors Guild of India (EGI) has expressed concern over the recent exchanges between Indian officials and journalists during Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit to Norway and the Netherlands. The...

item.title: Indianapolis 500 honours Kyle Busch following his death at 41
item.description: The Indianapolis 500 was marked by widespread tributes to NASCAR legend Kyle Busch following his sudden death at the age of 41. The racing community at Indianapolis Motor Speedway came together to hon...

item.title: A Look at Ava Gardner’s Rise to Hollywood Stardom Through 1940s Photography
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday highlights the early Hollywood career and iconic style of actress Ava Gardner through a collection of 35 photographs taken during the 1940s. Ava Gardner, born in 192...

item.title: Rescue operations slowed after pancake-style building collapse in Angeles City
item.description: Authorities and rescue teams faced major challenges during operations following a building collapse in Angeles City, Pampanga. According to the report, the structure suffered what responders described...

item.title: Arsenal to Wear Gold Premier League Badge Next Season After Title Victory
item.description: Arsenal officially lifted the 2025/2026 Premier League trophy after beating Crystal Palace 2-1 at Selhurst Park, marking the club’s first league title in 22 years. Mikel Arteta’s side had already secu...

item.title: Analyst says Bruce Springsteen’s tour demonstrates a model of effective political resistance to Trump
item.description: An opinion analysis highlights how Bruce Springsteen’s current concert tour has been interpreted as a form of political resistance to Donald Trump, according to labor journalist Steven Greenhouse writ...

item.title: PTI says meeting with Mohsin Naqvi was held to discuss terrorism and law and order situation in KP
item.description: Pakistan Tehreek-i-Insaf (PTI) has confirmed that Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister Sohail Afridi and party chairman Barrister Gohar Ali Khan recently held a meeting with Interior Minister Mohsin Naqv...
